name: Selen Hemein
description: Also known as the "Cursed Belt Princess." Daughter of a noble, Selen was cursed as a child by a magic belt that wrapped tightly around her head and could not be removed by any known magic. This accident led to scandal and shame to the nobility. She desperately developed her strength on account of a claim that power greater than the belt would break it, and came to the capital to join the army and further hone her power. name: Shakuyaku
description: Shakuyaku, also know by her nickname Shakky, is the Bartender of Shakky's Rip-off Bar on the Sabaody Archipelago. She is a former pirate alongside her companion Rayleigh and is also known for once being chased by notable marine Monkey D. Garp. Shakky is very smart, and seems to constantly seek information - particularly on other pirates. name: Stephen Loud
description: Stephen works for Near as part of his investigation team, along with Lidner and Rester, and later plays an important role in stopping Kira. When suspicions arise towards Mikami, Near assigns Gevanni the task of following him, studying his methodic lifestyle, and finding his connections to the Death Note. name: Takezou Kamota
description: Takezo is an elderly man with a gentle and kind demeanor. Despite his age, he remains an active member of the Chocolate Rabbit Guild and contributes to its activities. He owns a strawberry farm.

name: Yakumo Saitou
description: Saitou Yakumo is a college student. He was born with different eye colors. His red left eye gives him a special ability to see ghosts and spirits. He believes ghosts and spirits are bound to earth because of a certain 'cause' and simply eliminating that 'cause' will those spirits rest in peace. Being asked for help by Ozawa Haruka, they begin the investigation together.

name: Yasaka
description: Yasaka is a nine-tailed fox and the mother of Kunou. She is an extremely powerful Youkai that is on par with an Ultimate-Class Devil, and is the leader of the Youkai in Kyoto.

name: Yasuke
description: The first African samurai.

name: Yubel
description: Yubel is the primary antagonist of the third season of Yu-Gi-Oh! GX. name: Ageha
description: A former slave and survivor of the Blue Nobles, a nomadic people all but wiped out by the government. Ageha saved Sarasa from the Red King when she was younger, but he lost his left eye in the bargain. He has friends all across Japan and is capable of calling in tremendous favors from them. Ageha usually tours with Madam Butterfly's troupe of traveling performers under the name Kicho, the star dancer. He keeps an owl, Kagero, who is a parent of Sarasa's owl, Shinbashi.

name: Antonio Lopez
description: Apparently he had not been participating for a while before episode 1. His sponsor is Japanese barbecue restaurant chain Gyu-Kaku. Prior to the show's start, he has already been good friends with Kotetsu.

name: Arona
description: Arona is a self-proclaimed high-performance AI who serves as the OS of the Shittim Chest. She resides in a desolate classroom located in the midst of a watery expanse, stretching further than the eye can see. When she's not helping Sensei with their tasks, she's up to goofy antics that appear on Arona Channel. She has a child-like personality and is quite gullible, often falling for Sensei's jokes. name: Goku Son
description: __Height:__ 162 cm (5'4") Perpetually hungry, energetic, and playful, Goku is Sanzo's constant compansion—viewing him as the "sun" around which his world revolves. He is neither a demon nor human, but is a heretic born from the Earth itself. Along with his incredible strength and speed, he uses his _nyoibou_ (extendable staff) to fight demons in battle. name: Hajime Owari
description: An intelligent woman who has trouble keeping a job due to her laziness and other personality quirks. She ends up working at Shikada Dagashi in exchange for room and board.

name: Haru Ichinose
